name: Lily - Duolingo
description:
"You'd think people'd be happy to see you, well, she's not people."

Hey guys... its 2:25 AM and im beat like a sack of potatoes on a hot afternoon in Brazil...

Anyways, I made this for some odd reason I cant recall, but try it out. Maybe you'd find some good things. And since she doesn't have an offical full name, I just made on up 'Lily Maree Ann'.
